meta.note: Each entry stores the English source text, all known locations, and the translated value for this language.

html.abduction_or_flexion_of_the_hip_bey.source: Abduction or flexion of the hip beyond 30 degrees (moving hips forwards/backwards/sideways)
html.abduction_or_flexion_of_the_hip_bey.value: Abduktion eller fleksion af hoften (bevægelse af hofterne fremad/bagud/sidelæns) mere end 30 grader

html.abnormal_flexion_pull_muscles_inwar.source: Abnormal flexion (pull muscles inward) to pain.
html.abnormal_flexion_pull_muscles_inwar.value: Unormal fleksion (trækker musklerne indad) ved smerte.

html.adaptation_by_aureole_chang_and_ale.source: adaptation | By Aureole Chang and Alexander Metzger |
html.adaptation_by_aureole_chang_and_ale.value: tilpasning | Af Aureole Chang og Alexander Metzger |

html.and_or_ask_your_patients_athletes_t.source: and/or ask your patients/athletes to fill it out too.
html.and_or_ask_your_patients_athletes_t.value: og/eller bed dine patienter/atleter om også at udfylde den.

html.and_privacy_focused_this_means_no_u.source: and Privacy focused. This means no usage data is collected, but we'd still love to hear from you so we can improve the tool. Here are some optional ways you can contribute:
html.and_privacy_focused_this_means_no_u.value: og fokuseret på privatliv. Det betyder, at der ikke indsamles nogen brugsdata, men vi vil stadig meget gerne høre fra dig, så vi kan forbedre værktøjet. Her er nogle valgfrie måder, du kan bidrage på:

html.athlete_reports_neck_pain_at_rest.5.source: Athlete reports neck pain at rest.

html.balance_gait_difficulties_motor_inc.source: Balance/gait difficulties, motor incoordination, ataxia: stumbling, slow/laboured movements.
html.balance_gait_difficulties_motor_inc.value: Balance-/gangvanskeligheder, motorisk koordinationsproblemer, ataksi: snublen, langsomme/anstrengte bevægelser.

html.can_the_athlete_follow_instructions.source: Can the athlete follow instructions for how to move (e.g. "lift your arm") or respond to pain (pinch or poke)?
html.can_the_athlete_follow_instructions.value: Kan atleten følge instruktioner om, hvordan man bevæger sig (f.eks. "løft armen") eller reagere på smerte (knib eller prikke)?

html.check_box_if_athlete_completed_all_.source: Check box if athlete completed all the months correctly.
html.check_box_if_athlete_completed_all_.value: Markér feltet, hvis atleten har udfyldt alle måneder korrekt.

html.check_if_symptoms_get_worse_with_me.source: Check if symptoms get worse with mental activity.
html.check_if_symptoms_get_worse_with_me.value: Kontroller om symptomer forværres ved mental aktivitet.

html.check_if_symptoms_get_worse_with_ph.source: Check if symptoms get worse with physical activity.
html.check_if_symptoms_get_worse_with_ph.value: Undersøg om symptomerne forværres ved fysisk aktivitet.

html.click_the_round_add_button_below_to.source: Click the round add button below to add an athlete profile. This will let you start a baseline assessment and create an athlete profile that you can use to compare concussion scores over time for the athlete.
html.click_the_round_add_button_below_to.value: Klik på den runde tilføj-knap nedenfor for at tilføje en atletprofil. Dette giver dig mulighed for at starte en baseline-vurdering og oprette en atletprofil, som du kan bruge til at sammenligne hjernerystelsesscorer over tid for atleten.

html.confused_answers_but_not_fully_awar.source: Confused. Answers but not fully aware what's happening.
html.confused_answers_but_not_fully_awar.value: Forvirret. Svarer, men er ikke helt klar over, hvad der sker.

html.coordination_finger_to_nose_is_norm.source: Coordination. Finger-to-nose is normal for both hands with eyes open and closed.
html.coordination_finger_to_nose_is_norm.value: Koordination. Finger-til-næse er normalt for begge hænder med åbne og lukkede øjne.

html.did_your_team_win_the_last_game.79e.source: Did your team win the last game?
html.did_your_team_win_the_last_game.79e.value: Vandt dit hold den sidste kamp?

html.disorientation_or_confusion_staring.source: Disorientation or confusion, staring or limited responsiveness, or an inability to respond appropriately to questions.
html.disorientation_or_confusion_staring.value: Desorientering eller forvirring, stirren eller begrænset reaktionsevne eller manglende evne til at reagere passende på spørgsmål.

html.do_you_want_to_help_make_this_tool_.source: Do you want to help make this tool better?
html.do_you_want_to_help_make_this_tool_.value: Vil du hjælpe med at gøre dette værktøj bedre?

html.does_the_athlete_know_their_name_wh.source: Does the athlete know their name, where they are at, the day/year, etc?
html.does_the_athlete_know_their_name_wh.value: Kender atleten sit navn, hvor de er, dagen/året osv.?

html.examiner_ask_the_athlete_the_follow.source: Examiner, ask the athlete the following questions and select the ones they answer correctly.
html.examiner_ask_the_athlete_the_follow.value: Eksaminator, stil atleten følgende spørgsmål og vælg dem, de svarer korrekt på

html.examiner_click_the_words_below_as_t.source: Examiner, click the words below as the athlete remembers them to cross them off. This will help keep track of how many they remember each trial.
html.examiner_click_the_words_below_as_t.value: Eksaminator, klik på ordene nedenfor, mens atleten husker dem, for at krydse dem af. Dette vil hjælpe med at holde styr på, hvor mange de husker hvert forsøg.

html.examiner_for_the_second_and_third_t.source: Examiner, for the second and third trials say the following:
html.examiner_for_the_second_and_third_t.value: Eksaminator sig følgende for den anden og tredje retssag:

html.examiner_keep_a_count_of_the_errors.source: Examiner, keep a count of the errors listed above and read the instructions below:
html.examiner_keep_a_count_of_the_errors.value: Eksaminator, hold styr på ovenstående fejl og læs instruktionerne nedenfor:

html.examiner_please_hand_the_device_to_.source: Examiner, please hand the device to the athlete to fill in the symptom scale (below) after you provide instructions.
html.examiner_please_hand_the_device_to_.value: Eksaminator, giv venligst apparatet til atleten, så han/hun kan udfylde symptomskalaen (nedenfor), efter du har givet instruktionerne.

html.examiner_please_keep_the_3_meter_lo.source: Examiner, please keep the 3-meter-long athletic tape line from the Timed Gait on the floor/firm surface. You will follow the script below, click start/end timer, and click on the responses that the athlete correctly says in order. Redo trials where the athlete strays off the line.
html.examiner_please_keep_the_3_meter_lo.value: Eksaminator, behold venligst den 3 meter lange sportsbåndslinje fra på gulvet/den faste overflade. Du skal følge vejledningen nedenfor, klikke på start/slut timer og klikke på de svar, som atleten korrekt giver i rækkefølge. Gentag de forsøg, hvor atleten afviger fra linjen.

html.examiner_please_place_a_3_meter_lon.source: Examiner, please place a 3-meter-long line on the floor/firm surface with athletic tape. You will instruct the athlete and start/stop the timer for 3 trials.
html.examiner_please_place_a_3_meter_lon.value: Eksaminator, placer venligst en 3 meter lang line på gulvet/fast overflade med sportsbånd. Du vil instruere atleten og starte/stoppe timeren i 3 forsøg.

html.examiner_read_the_following_line_an.source: Examiner, read the following line and ask the following questions (modified to be appropriate to the relevant sport). Check the correctly answered questions.
html.examiner_read_the_following_line_an.value: Eksaminator, læs følgende linje og stil følgende spørgsmål (ændret for at være passende til den relevante sportsgren). Marker de korrekt besvarede spørgsmål.

html.examiner_read_the_following_numbers.source: Examiner, read the following numbers (one sequence from each set) and ask the athlete to repeat them back in reverse order. Say them slowly at a rate of one digit per second. Each set has two number sequences. If the athlete fails the first, try the second. If both fail, end this subsection and move on to the months in reverse order.
html.examiner_read_the_following_numbers.value: Eksaminator, læs følgende tal (én sekvens fra hvert sæt) og bed atleten om at gentage dem i omvendt rækkefølge. Sig dem langsomt med et ciffer pr. sekund. Hvert sæt har to talsekvenser. Hvis atleten ikke klarer det første tal, kan man prøve det andet. Hvis begge ikke klarer det, afsluttes dette underafsnit og der gås videre til månederne i omvendt rækkefølge.

html.examiner_read_the_instructions_belo.source: Examiner, read the instructions below to the athlete and click to cross out the months as they say them in the correct order.
html.examiner_read_the_instructions_belo.value: Eksaminator, læs instruktionerne nedenfor for atleten og klik for at strege månederne over, efterhånden som de står i den rigtige rækkefølge.

html.examiner_you_will_guide_the_athlete.source: Examiner, you will guide the athlete through 3 poses (double leg, tandem, and single leg stance) to be held for 20 seconds each. The later foam pad test is optional, only a solid floor/ground surface is required. You'll need a spotter to keep an eye on the athlete and be ready to assist them if they become unstable and begin to fall.
html.examiner_you_will_guide_the_athlete.value: Eksaminator, du vil guide atleten gennem 3 stillinger (tobens-, tandem- og enkeltbens-stilling), der skal holdes i 20 sekunder hver. Den senere skumpudetest er valgfri, kun et fast gulv/jordoverflade er påkrævet. Du skal bruge en observatør til at holde øje med atleten og være klar til at hjælpe dem, hvis de bliver ustabile og begynder at falde.

html.examiner_you_will_read_the_list_of_.source: Examiner, you will read the list of words 3 times, keeping track of how many words the athlete remembers after each reading. All 3 trials must be administered irrespective of the number correct on each. Start the first trial by saying the following:
html.examiner_you_will_read_the_list_of_.value: Eksaminator, du skal læse ordlisten 3 gange og holde styr på, hvor mange ord atleten husker efter hver læsning. Alle 3 forsøg skal udføres uanset det korrekte antal på hver. Start det første forsøg med at sige følgende:

html.from_the_automated_bess_to_inform_m.source: from the automated BESS to inform more inclusive ML models.
html.from_the_automated_bess_to_inform_m.value: fra det automatiserede BESS til at informere mere inkluderende ML-modeller.

html.good_now_you_will_walk_heel_to_toe_.source: Good, now you will walk heel-to-toe and count backwards out loud at the same time. Keep counting until you finish walking the 3 meters, turning 180 degrees, walking the 3 meters again and the examiner says stop indicating you got to the last number. Are you ready? The number to start with is 88. Go!
html.good_now_you_will_walk_heel_to_toe_.value: Godt, nu skal du gå hæl til tå og tælle højt baglæns samtidig. Fortsæt med at tælle, indtil du er færdig med at gå de 3 meter, drejer dig 180 grader, går de 3 meter igen, og eksaminator siger stop, hvilket indikerer, at du er nået til det sidste tal. Er du klar? Tallet at starte med er 88. Start!

html.healthy_athletes_typically_complete.source: Healthy athletes typically complete the task in 18.7-22.5 seconds with 85.8-92.4% accuracy (0.9-1.7 errors). Concussed athletes typically take 30.6-36.1 seconds with 76.4-83.6% accuracy (2.0-2.8 errors).
html.healthy_athletes_typically_complete.value: Raske atleter gennemfører typisk opgaven på 18,7-22,5 sekunder med en nøjagtighed på 85,8-92,4 % (0,9-1,7 fejl). Atleter med hjernerystelse bruger typisk 30,6-36,1 sekunder med en nøjagtighed på 76,4-83,6 % (2,0-2,8 fejl).

html.healthy_athletes_typically_have_a_f.source: Healthy athletes typically have a fastest time between 13.9 and 15.8. Newly concussed athletes are typically between 21.9 and 26.1. Athletes concussed within the last 6-73 days will be somewhere in between.
html.healthy_athletes_typically_have_a_f.value: Raske atleter har typisk en hurtigste tid mellem 13,9 og 15,8. Nyligt ramte atleter ligger typisk mellem 21,9 og 26,1. Atleter, der har fået hjernerystelse inden for de sidste 6-73 dage, vil ligge et sted midt imellem.

html.i_am_going_to_repeat_the_same_list_.source: I am going to repeat the same list. Repeat back as many words as you can remember in any order, even if you said the word before in a previous trial
html.i_am_going_to_repeat_the_same_list_.value: Jeg gentager den samme liste. Gentag så mange ord, som du kan huske, i vilkårlig rækkefølge, selvom du sagde ordet før i en tidligere prøve.

html.i_am_going_to_test_your_memory_i_wi.source: I am going to test your memory. I will read you a list of words and when I am done, repeat back as many words as you can remember, in any order
html.i_am_going_to_test_your_memory_i_wi.value: Jeg vil teste din hukommelse. Jeg læser en liste med ord op for dig, og når jeg er færdig, gentager du så mange ord, som du kan huske, i vilkårlig rækkefølge

html.i_m_going_to_read_a_string_of_numbe.source: I'm going to read a string of numbers and when I am done, you repeat them back to me in reverse order of how I read them to you. For example, if I say 7 1 9, you would say 9 1 7. So, if I said 9 6 8 you would say?
html.i_m_going_to_read_a_string_of_numbe.value: Jeg vil læse en række tal op, og når jeg er færdig, gentager du dem for mig i omvendt rækkefølge af, hvordan jeg læste dem op for dig. For eksempel, hvis jeg siger 7 1 9, ville du sige 9 1 7. Så hvis jeg sagde 9 6 8, ville du sige?

html.if_100_is_feeling_perfectly_normal_.source: If 100% is feeling perfectly normal, what percent of normal do you feel?
html.if_100_is_feeling_perfectly_normal_.value: Hvor mange procent af normal føler du dig?

html.if_no_neck_pain_and_no_tenderness_a.source: If NO neck pain and NO tenderness, athlete has full range of ACTIVE pain free movement.
html.if_no_neck_pain_and_no_tenderness_a.value: Hvis der INGEN nakkesmerter og INGEN ømhed er, atleten har fuld AKTIV smertefri bevægelse.

html.in_a_patient_who_is_not_lucid_or_fu.source: In a patient who is not lucid or fully conscious, a cervical spine injury should be assumed and spinal precautions taken. Check each box for yes, keep unselected for no.
html.in_a_patient_who_is_not_lucid_or_fu.value: Hos en patient, der ikke er klar eller fuldt bevidst, bør der antages en skade på halshvirvelsøjlen, og der bør tages forholdsregler mod rygsøjlen. Marker hver boks for ja, og undlad at markere den for nej.

html.inappropriate_words_random_but_comp.source: Inappropriate words. Random but comprehensible words.
html.inappropriate_words_random_but_comp.value: Upassende ord. Tilfældige, men forståelige ord.

html.keep_a_count_of_the_following_error.source: Keep a count of the following errors in the athlete's execution of the poses:
html.keep_a_count_of_the_following_error.value: Hold styr på følgende fejl i atletens udførelse af stillingerne:

html.lifting_hands_off_iliac_crests_uppe.source: Lifting hands off iliac crests (upper border of the pelvis/hip-bone)
html.lifting_hands_off_iliac_crests_uppe.value: Løfter hænderne fra hoftekammene (øverste kant af bækkenet/hoftebenet)

html.limb_strength_and_sensation_is_norm.source: Limb strength and sensation is normal.
html.limb_strength_and_sensation_is_norm.value: Lemmernes styrke og følesans er normal.

html.localized_to_intentionally_moves_aw.source: Localized to (Intentionally moves away from) pain.
html.localized_to_intentionally_moves_aw.value: Lokaliserer (bevæger sig bevidst væk fra) smerte.

html.multiple_simultaneous_errors_count_.source: Multiple simultaneous errors count as one. Failure to hold the pose for at least 5 seconds counts as the maximum number of errors for that pose (10).
html.multiple_simultaneous_errors_count_.value: Flere samtidige fejl tæller som én. Hvis stillingen ikke kan holdes i mindst 5 sekunder, tæller det som maksimalt antal fejl for den stilling (10).

html.no_eye_opening_for_any_reason.f6a64.source: No eye opening for any reason.

html.observed_extraocular_eye_movements_.source: Observed extraocular eye movements are normal.

html.ocular_motor_athlete_can_look_side_.source: Ocular/Motor. Athlete can look side-to-side and up-and-down without moving their head/neck or getting double vision.
html.ocular_motor_athlete_can_look_side_.value: Okulær/motorisk. Atleten kan se fra side til side og op og ned uden at bevæge hoved/nakke eller få dobbeltsyn.

html.open_to_speech_when_asked_to_open.b.source: Open to speech (when asked to open).
html.open_to_speech_when_asked_to_open.b.value: Åbner ved tale (når personen bliver bedt om det).

html.opt_in_to_share_anonymized_test_sco.source: Opt-in to share anonymized test scores for research-use and to improve tool recommendations.
html.opt_in_to_share_anonymized_test_sco.value: Tilmeld dig frivilligt for at dele anonymiserede testresultater til forskning og forbedring af værktøjets anbefalinger.

html.please_rate_your_symptoms_below_bas.source: Please rate your symptoms below based on how you typically feel with 1 representing a very mild symptom and 6 representing a severe symptom. 0 means the symptom is not present
html.please_rate_your_symptoms_below_bas.value: Vurder venligst dine symptomer nedenfor ud fra hvordan du typisk har det, hvor 1 er et meget mildt symptom og 6 er et alvorligt symptom. 0 betyder, at symptomet ikke er til stede

html.please_rate_your_symptoms_below_bas.source: Please rate your symptoms below based on how you feel now with 1 representing a very mild symptom and 6 representing a severe symptom. 0 means the symptom is not present
html.please_rate_your_symptoms_below_bas.value: Vurder venligst dine symptomer nedenfor ud fra hvordan du har det nu, hvor 1 er et meget mildt symptom og 6 er et alvorligt symptom. 0 betyder, at symptomet ikke er til stede

html.power_systems_airex_balance_pad_810.value: Power Systems Airex Balance Pad 81000 (anbefalet model)

html.red_flags_are_signs_and_symptoms_th.source: Red flags are signs and symptoms that may indicate a more serious injury. If any of these are present, the athlete should be referred to a healthcare professional immediately.
html.red_flags_are_signs_and_symptoms_th.value: Røde flag er tegn og symptomer, som kan indikere en mere alvorlig skade. Hvis nogen af disse er til stede, skal atleten straks henvises til sundhedsfagligt personale.

html.remaining_out_of_the_testing_positi.source: Remaining out of the testing position for more than 5 seconds
html.remaining_out_of_the_testing_positi.value: Ude af testpositionen i mere end 5 sekunder

html.single_leg_stance_on_foam.c2e7d6d8.value: Stå på ét ben på skum (

html.stand_on_one_leg_hands_on_your_hips.source: Stand on one leg, hands on your hips, and eyes closed. Hold this position for 20 seconds
html.stand_on_one_leg_hands_on_your_hips.value: Stå på ét ben, med hænderne på hofterne og lukkede øjne. Hold denne position i 20 sekunder

html.stand_with_your_feet_in_a_heel_to_t.source: Stand with your feet in a heel-to-toe position, hands on your hips, and eyes closed. Hold this position for 20 seconds
html.stand_with_your_feet_in_a_heel_to_t.value: Stå med fødderne i hæl-mod-tå-position, hænderne på hofterne og lukkede øjne. Hold denne position i 20 sekunder

html.stand_with_your_feet_together_hands.source: Stand with your feet together, hands on your hips, and eyes closed. Hold this position for 20 seconds
html.stand_with_your_feet_together_hands.value: Stå med samlede fødder, hænderne på hofterne og lukkede øjne. Hold denne position i 20 sekunder

html.tell_me_the_months_of_the_year_in_r.source: Tell me the months of the year in reverse order as QUICKLY and as accurately as possible. Start with the last month and go backward. So, you'll say December, November... go ahead
html.tell_me_the_months_of_the_year_in_r.value: Sig årets måneder i omvendt rækkefølge så HURTIGT og præcist som muligt. Start med den sidste måned og gå baglæns. Du vil altså sige december, november... værsgo

html.the_athlete_should_take_their_shoes.source: The athlete should take their shoes off, roll up pant legs above ankles (if applicable), and remove any ankle taping (if applicable).
html.the_athlete_should_take_their_shoes.value: Atleten bør tage skoene af, rulle bukseben op over anklerne (hvis relevant) og fjerne eventuel ankeltape (hvis relevant).

html.the_athlete_will_be_guided_through_.source: The athlete will be guided through 3 poses (double leg, tandem, and single leg stance) to be held for 20 seconds each. The later foam pad test is optional, only a solid floor/ground surface is required. You'll need a spotter to keep an eye on the athlete and be ready to assist them if they become unstable and begin to fall.
html.the_athlete_will_be_guided_through_.value: Atleten guides gennem 3 stillinger (dobbelt ben, tandem og ét ben), som holdes i 20 sekunder hver. Den efterfølgende test på skumpude er valgfri; kun et fast gulv/underlag er nødvendigt. Du skal have en hjælper, der holder øje med atleten og er klar til at hjælpe ved ustabilitet og faldtendens.

html.the_foam_test_requires_a_50cm_x_40c.source: The foam test requires a 50cm x 40cm x 6cm foam pad. Recommended model is the
html.the_foam_test_requires_a_50cm_x_40c.value: Skumtesten kræver en skumpude på 50 cm x 40 cm x 6 cm. Anbefalet model er

html.trouble_falling_asleep.04758302.value: Svært ved at falde i søvn:

html.twisting_of_the_shoulder_beyond_30_.source: Twisting of the shoulder beyond 30 degrees
html.twisting_of_the_shoulder_beyond_30_.value: Rotation af skulderen ud over 30 grader

html.use_this_web_app_to_administer_conc.source: Use this web app to administer concussion assessments for your athletes. The data is stored locally in your browser unless you "Delete All". You can also sync the data with your Google Drive. See the
html.use_this_web_app_to_administer_conc.value: Brug denne webapp til at gennemføre hjernerystelsesvurderinger for dine atleter. Data gemmes lokalt i din browser, medmindre du vælger "Slet alle". Du kan også synkronisere data med din Google Drive. Se

html.weakness_or_tingling_burning_in_mor.source: Weakness or tingling/burning in more than 1 arm or in the legs
html.weakness_or_tingling_burning_in_mor.value: Svaghed eller prikken/brænden i mere end 1 arm eller i benene

html.what_is_the_day_of_the_week.3a96352.source: What is the day of the week?

html.what_team_did_you_play_last_week_ga.source: What team did you play last week / game?
html.what_team_did_you_play_last_week_ga.value: Hvilket hold spillede du mod i sidste uge / kamp?

html.what_time_is_it_right_now_within_1_.source: What time is it right now (within 1 hour)?
html.what_time_is_it_right_now_within_1_.value: Hvad er klokken lige nu (inden for 1 time)?

html.what_venue_are_we_at_today.d80e8772.source: What venue are we at today?
html.what_venue_are_we_at_today.d80e8772.value: Hvilket stadion/anlæg er vi på i dag?

html.when_the_timer_is_started_please_wa.source: When the timer is started, please walk heel-to-toe quickly to the end of the tape, turn around and come back as fast as you can, without separating your feet or stepping off the line
html.when_the_timer_is_started_please_wa.value: Når timeren starter, gå venligst hæl-mod-tå hurtigt til enden af tapen, vend rundt og kom tilbage så hurtigt som muligt uden at adskille fødderne eller træde uden for linjen

html.while_you_are_walking_heel_to_toe_y.source: While you are walking heel-to-toe, you will count backwards out loud by sevens. For example, if we started at 100, you would say 100, 93, 86, 79. Let's practice counting. Starting with 93, count backward by sevens until the examiner says stop
html.while_you_are_walking_heel_to_toe_y.value: Mens du går hæl-mod-tå, skal du tælle baglæns højt med syv ad gangen. Hvis vi fx starter ved 100, siger du 100, 93, 86, 79. Lad os øve. Start ved 93 og tæl baglæns med syv, indtil undersøgeren siger stop

html.who_scored_last_in_this_match.5c301.source: Who scored last in this match?
html.who_scored_last_in_this_match.5c301.value: Hvem scorede sidst i denne kamp?

html.you_will_be_asked_a_few_questions_p.source: You will be asked a few questions. Please listen carefully and give your best effort. First explain what happened?
html.you_will_be_asked_a_few_questions_p.value: Du vil blive stillet nogle få spørgsmål. Lyt venligst nøje og gør dit bedste. Forklar først, hvad der skete?

html.your_job_as_examiner_is_to_keep_the.source: Your job as examiner is to keep the camera as still as possible (minor shakes are fine) with the athlete fully in frame at all times. In case the automated system misses something, keep a count of the following errors in the athlete's execution of the poses:
html.your_job_as_examiner_is_to_keep_the.value: Din opgave som undersøger er at holde kameraet så roligt som muligt (mindre rystelser er okay), så atleten hele tiden er fuldt i billedet. Hvis det automatiske system overser noget, skal du tælle følgende fejl i atletens udførelse af stillingerne:

html_attr.enter_part_of_an_athlete_name..source: Enter part of an athlete name
html_attr.enter_part_of_an_athlete_name..value: Indtast en del af en atlets navn

html_attr.first_page_of_the_paper_scat6..source: first page of the paper SCAT6

html_attr.how_many_athletes_to_show.8645.value: hvor mange atleter der skal vises

runtime.404.details.source: This page was generated by the Firebase Command-Line Interface. To modify it, edit the 404.html file in your project's configured public directory.
runtime.404.details.value: Denne side blev genereret af Firebase Command-Line Interface. For at ændre den skal du redigere filen 404.html i projektets konfigurerede public-mappe.

runtime.404.message.source: The specified file was not found on this website. Please check the URL for mistakes and try again.
runtime.404.message.value: Den angivne fil blev ikke fundet på dette website. Kontroller URL'en for fejl, og prøv igen.

runtime.alert.sync_failed.source: Failed to sync data. Make sure you checked the box to give the app permission to add app data to your Google Drive.
runtime.alert.sync_failed.value: Synkronisering af data mislykkedes. Kontroller, at du har givet appen tilladelse til at gemme appdata i din Google Drive.

runtime.bess.calibrate_prompt.source: Attempting to calibrate the pose detection model to the current pose. Please hold the pose for 10 seconds.
runtime.bess.calibrate_prompt.value: Forsøger at kalibrere posedetektionsmodellen til den aktuelle stilling. Hold venligst stillingen i 10 sekunder.

runtime.bess.camera_notice.source: The automated balance system will use the camera.
runtime.bess.camera_notice.value: Det automatiserede balancesystem vil bruge kameraet.

runtime.bess.error.align_heel_toe.source: Please align the heel of the dominant foot with the toe of the non-dominant foot.
runtime.bess.error.align_heel_toe.value: Placér venligst hælen på den dominerende fod ud for tåen på den ikke-dominerende fod.

runtime.bess.error.bend_elbows.source: Please bend both elbows without twisting the shoulders.
runtime.bess.error.bend_elbows.value: Bøj venligst begge albuer uden at dreje skuldrene.

runtime.bess.error.cant_find_athlete.source: Can't find athlete. Please make sure they are fully in frame.
runtime.bess.error.cant_find_athlete.value: Kan ikke finde atleten. Sørg for, at hele personen er i billedet.

runtime.bess.error.detector.source: Unexpected error deciphering the pose. Skipping to manual assessment.
runtime.bess.error.detector.value: Uventet fejl ved registrering af stilling. Skifter til manuel vurdering.

runtime.bess.error.dominant_foot_visible.source: The dominant foot must be visible in front of the non-dominant foot.
runtime.bess.error.dominant_foot_visible.value: Den dominerende fod skal være synlig foran den ikke-dominerende fod.

runtime.bess.error.left_hand_far.source: Left hand is too far from the hip. Please move it closer.
runtime.bess.error.left_hand_far.value: Venstre hånd er for langt fra hoften. Flyt den venligst tættere på.

runtime.bess.error.lift_dominant_foot.source: Please lift dominant foot off the ground.
runtime.bess.error.lift_dominant_foot.value: Løft venligst den dominerende fod fra underlaget.

runtime.bess.error.move_dominant_forward.source: Please move the dominant foot further forward.
runtime.bess.error.move_dominant_forward.value: Flyt venligst den dominerende fod længere frem.

runtime.bess.error.multiple_people.source: Multiple people detected. Please make sure only {{athleteName}} is in frame.
runtime.bess.error.multiple_people.value: Flere personer registreret. Sørg for, at kun {{athleteName}} er i billedet.

runtime.bess.error.part_not_detected.source: {{part}} not detected. Please make sure it is fully in frame and you are facing the camera straight on.
runtime.bess.error.part_not_detected.value: {{part}} blev ikke registreret. Sørg for, at den er helt i billedet, og at du vender lige mod kameraet.

runtime.bess.error.right_hand_far.source: Right hand is too far from the hip. Please move it closer.
runtime.bess.error.right_hand_far.value: Højre hånd er for langt fra hoften. Flyt den venligst tættere på.

runtime.bess.error.stand_straight_no_ben.source: Please stand straight without bending/twisting knees or upper body.
runtime.bess.error.stand_straight_no_ben.value: Stå venligst lige uden at bøje/dreje knæ eller overkrop.

runtime.bess.error.stand_straight_no_sid.source: Please stand straight without moving hips side to side.
runtime.bess.error.stand_straight_no_sid.value: Stå venligst lige uden at bevæge hofterne sideværts.

runtime.bess.error.video.source: Unexpected error with the camera. Skipping to manual assessment.
runtime.bess.error.video.value: Uventet fejl med kameraet. Skifter til manuel vurdering.

runtime.bess.pose.double.source: please stand straight with hands on your hips and feet touching
runtime.bess.pose.double.value: stå venligst lige med hænderne på hofterne og fødderne samlet

runtime.bess.pose.double_foam.source: please stand straight with hands on your hips and feet touching on foam
runtime.bess.pose.double_foam.value: stå venligst lige med hænderne på hofterne og fødderne samlet på skum

runtime.bess.pose.single.source: please stand on your non-dominant leg with hands on your hips
runtime.bess.pose.single.value: stå venligst på dit ikke-dominerende ben med hænderne på hofterne

runtime.bess.pose.single_foam.source: please stand on your non-dominant leg with hands on your hips on foam
runtime.bess.pose.single_foam.value: stå venligst på dit ikke-dominerende ben med hænderne på hofterne på skum

runtime.bess.pose.tandem.source: please stand heel-to-toe (non-dominant foot in the back) with hands on your hips
runtime.bess.pose.tandem.value: stå venligst hæl-mod-tå (ikke-dominerende fod bagest) med hænderne på hofterne

runtime.bess.pose.tandem_foam.source: please stand heel-to-toe (non-dominant foot in the back) with hands on your hips on foam
runtime.bess.pose.tandem_foam.value: stå venligst hæl-mod-tå (ikke-dominerende fod bagest) med hænderne på hofterne på skum

runtime.bess.status.pose_good_20.value: Stillingen ser god ud! 20 sekunder tilbage.

runtime.bess.status.pose_good_seconds_er.source: Pose looks good! {{seconds}} seconds left. Errors: {{errors}}
runtime.bess.status.pose_good_seconds_er.value: Stillingen ser god ud! {{seconds}} sekunder tilbage. Fejl: {{errors}}

runtime.bess.status.pose_good_start.source: Pose looks good! Click to start the 20 second trial where the pose must be held
runtime.bess.status.pose_good_start.value: Stillingen ser god ud! Klik for at starte 20-sekunders prøven, hvor stillingen skal holdes

runtime.bess.voice.help.source: Say 'mirror' to toggle the mirror effect. Say 'next' to move to the next pose. Say 'skip' to skip the test.
runtime.bess.voice.help.value: Sig 'mirror' for at slå spejleffekt til/fra. Sig 'next' for at gå til næste stilling. Sig 'skip' for at springe testen over.

runtime.confirm.delete_all.source: Are you sure you want to delete all data?
runtime.confirm.delete_all.value: Er du sikker på, at du vil slette alle data?

runtime.confirm.delete_athlete.source: Are you sure you want to delete this athlete's data?
runtime.confirm.delete_athlete.value: Er du sikker på, at du vil slette denne atlets data?

runtime.confirm.delete_drive.source: This will delete all data from your GDrive but keep it on this device. Are you sure?
runtime.confirm.delete_drive.value: Dette vil slette alle data fra din Google Drive, men beholde dem på denne enhed. Er du sikker?

runtime.confirm.unlink.source: This will delete all data from this device but keep it on your GDrive. Are you sure?
runtime.confirm.unlink.value: Dette vil slette alle data fra denne enhed, men beholde dem i din Google Drive. Er du sikker?

runtime.delayed_recall.back_to_immediate.source: Back to the Immediate Memory section

runtime.delayed_recall.instructions.source: Examiner, read the below instructions and select the words that the athlete can remember from the Immediate Memory section.
runtime.delayed_recall.instructions.value: Undersøger, læs instruktionerne nedenfor op og vælg de ord, som atleten kan huske fra afsnittet Umiddelbar Hukommelse.

runtime.delayed_recall.need_immediate_mi.source: The Immediate Memory section must be completed at least 5 minutes before this section. It has not been completed at all.
runtime.delayed_recall.need_immediate_mi.value: Afsnittet Umiddelbar Hukommelse skal være gennemført mindst 5 minutter før dette afsnit. Det er slet ikke blevet gennemført.

runtime.delayed_recall.need_immediate_wa.source: The Immediate Memory section must be completed at least 5 minutes before this section. Delayed Recall will open in {{seconds}} seconds.
runtime.delayed_recall.need_immediate_wa.value: Afsnittet Umiddelbar Hukommelse skal være gennemført mindst 5 minutter før dette afsnit. Forsinket Genkaldelse åbner om {{seconds}} sekunder.

runtime.delayed_recall.prompt.source: Do you remember the list of words read a few times earlier during the immediate memory section? Tell me as many words from the list as you can remember in any order
runtime.delayed_recall.prompt.value: Kan du huske ordlisten, der blev læst op et par gange tidligere under afsnittet umiddelbar hukommelse? Fortæl mig så mange ord fra listen, som du kan huske, i vilkårlig rækkefølge

runtime.delayed_recall.words_missing.source: Somehow the list of words was not saved.
runtime.delayed_recall.words_missing.value: Af en eller anden grund blev ordlisten ikke gemt.

runtime.popup.attest_hcp.source: I hereby attest that I am a medical or Health Care Professional authorized to use this tool:
runtime.popup.attest_hcp.value: Jeg erklærer hermed, at jeg er en sundhedsprofessionel med autorisation til at bruge dette værktøj:

runtime.popup.cognitive_text.source: The "cognitive screening" portion of the baseline and post injury assessments should be completed in a distraction-free environment with the athlete in a resting state.
runtime.popup.cognitive_text.value: Den "kognitive screening"-del af baseline- og post-skade-vurderinger bør gennemføres i et miljø uden forstyrrelser, mens atleten er i hvile.

runtime.popup.diagnosed_adhd.source: Diagnosed with attention deficit hyperactivity disorder (ADHD).

runtime.popup.diagnosed_headache_migrain.source: Diagnosed with a headache disorder or migraine.

runtime.popup.diagnosed_learning_dyslexi.source: Diagnosed with a learning disability or dyslexia.

runtime.popup.diagnosed_psych.source: Diagnosed with depression, anxiety or a psychological disorder.
runtime.popup.diagnosed_psych.value: Diagnosticeret med depression, angst eller anden psykisk lidelse.

runtime.popup.hcp_only_text.source: For Use by Health Care Professionals Only. See the original
runtime.popup.hcp_only_text.value: Kun til brug for sundhedsprofessionelle. Se den originale

runtime.popup.immediate_text.source: The immediate assessment should be completed "on-field" after the first aid/emergency care priorities are completed.
runtime.popup.immediate_text.value: Den akutte vurdering bør gennemføres "på banen", efter at førstehjælp/akutbehandling er afsluttet.

runtime.popup.med_bg_question.source: Has the athlete ever been (if yes, describe below):
runtime.popup.med_bg_question.value: Har atleten tidligere haft følgende (hvis ja, beskriv nedenfor):

runtime.popup.placeholder_team_school.source: Varsity X at Y High School
runtime.popup.placeholder_team_school.value: Varsity X på Y High School

runtime.popup.remove_from_play_default.source: Remove athlete from play for immediate medical assessment or transport to hospital/medical center.
runtime.popup.remove_from_play_default.value: Fjern atleten fra spillet med henblik på øjeblikkelig medicinsk vurdering eller transport til hospital/medicinsk center.

runtime.popup.remove_from_play_spinal.source: Spinal immobilization and cervical collar. Then remove athlete from play for immediate medical assessment or transport to hospital/medical center.
runtime.popup.remove_from_play_spinal.value: Immobilisér rygsøjlen og anlæg halskrave. Fjern derefter atleten fra spillet med henblik på øjeblikkelig medicinsk vurdering eller transport til hospital/medicinsk center.

runtime.results.different_prompt.source: If the athlete was known to you prior to their injury, are they different from their usual self?
runtime.results.different_prompt.value: Hvis du kendte atleten før skaden, er vedkommende så anderledes end normalt?

runtime.workspace.alert.enter_workspace_.value: Indtast venligst et navn på arbejdsområdet.

runtime.workspace.alert.join_from_invite.value: Kunne ikke deltage i delt arbejdsområde via invitation: {{error}}

runtime.workspace.alert.not_owner_active.source: You do not own an active shared workspace.
runtime.workspace.alert.not_owner_active.value: Du ejer ikke et aktivt delt arbejdsområde.

runtime.workspace.alert.only_owner_remov.source: Only the workspace owner can remove members.
runtime.workspace.alert.only_owner_remov.value: Kun arbejdsområdets ejer kan fjerne medlemmer.

runtime.workspace.alert.owner_must_delet.source: You already own another shared workspace. Delete that workspace first before joining a different one.
runtime.workspace.alert.owner_must_delet.value: Du ejer allerede et andet delt arbejdsområde. Slet det arbejdsområde først, før du deltager i et andet.

runtime.workspace.confirm.delete_for_all.source: Delete shared workspace "{{workspaceName}}" for all members?
runtime.workspace.confirm.delete_for_all.value: Slet delt arbejdsområde "{{workspaceName}}" for alle medlemmer?

runtime.workspace.confirm.join_replace_d.source: Joining shared workspace invite code {{inviteCode}} will replace your currently accessible athlete/test data in this app with the workspace data. Continue?
runtime.workspace.confirm.join_replace_d.value: Hvis du deltager med invitationskoden {{inviteCode}} til et delt arbejdsområde, erstattes de data om atleter/tests, du aktuelt har adgang til i appen, med arbejdsområdets data. Fortsæt?

runtime.workspace.confirm.leave.source: This will remove this account from the current shared workspace. Continue?
runtime.workspace.confirm.leave.value: Dette vil fjerne denne konto fra det nuværende delte arbejdsområde. Fortsæt?

runtime.workspace.confirm.remove_member.source: Remove this member from the workspace? They will immediately lose access.
runtime.workspace.confirm.remove_member.value: Fjern dette medlem fra arbejdsområdet? Vedkommende mister straks adgangen.

runtime.workspace.confirm.switch_current.source: You are already in "{{activeWorkspaceName}}". Switch to the new workspace? This removes local access to data from the old workspace.
runtime.workspace.confirm.switch_current.value: Du er allerede i "{{activeWorkspaceName}}". Skifte til det nye arbejdsområde? Dette fjerner lokal adgang til data fra det gamle arbejdsområde.

runtime.workspace.confirm.switch_from_in.source: You are already in shared workspace "{{activeWorkspaceName}}". Switch to invite code {{inviteCode}}? This removes local access to data from the old workspace.
runtime.workspace.confirm.switch_from_in.value: Du er allerede i delt arbejdsområde "{{activeWorkspaceName}}". Skift til invitationskoden {{inviteCode}}? Dette fjerner lokal adgang til data fra det gamle arbejdsområde.

runtime.workspace.storage_note.source: Shared workspace data syncs between members and is stored in Cloudflare D1 (EU-only region).
runtime.workspace.storage_note.value: Data i delt arbejdsområde synkroniseres mellem medlemmer og gemmes i Cloudflare D1 (kun EU-region).
